environment.description:
The environment of the project.
prod Production
stage Staging
dev Development

prod Production
stage Staging
dev Development

home_region.description:
The project's data home region
eu-central EUCentral
asia-northeast AsiaNorthEast
us-east USEast
us-west USWest
eu EU
asia Asia
us US
global Global

us-east USEast

hosts.description: The FQDN hostnames this project listens on

state.description:
The state of the project.
running Running
halted Halted
deleted Deleted
state.x-go-enum-desc:
running Running
halted Halted
deleted Deleted

access_policy.description:
Controls who can access the workspace and its projects

This does not control access level, only who can access it at all.
CHECK_ORGANIZATION_AND_WORKSPACE_MEMBERSHIP WorkspaceAccessPolicyOrganizationMembershipRequired  Only invited members that are part of the organization defined for the workspace can access it
CHECK_ACCESS_PERMISSION WorkspaceAccessPolicyMembershipRequired  All invited members can access the workspace, regardless of their organization membership  This is useful for migration scenarios where workspaces previously did not have an organization assigned  If a user is just a member of a project within the workspace, they'll still have access to the project, but not to the workspace itself (the default for existing workspaces)
access_policy.x-go-enum-desc:
CHECK_ORGANIZATION_AND_WORKSPACE_MEMBERSHIP WorkspaceAccessPolicyOrganizationMembershipRequired  Only invited members that are part of the organization defined for the workspace can access it
CHECK_ACCESS_PERMISSION WorkspaceAccessPolicyMembershipRequired  All invited members can access the workspace, regardless of their organization membership  This is useful for migration scenarios where workspaces previously did not have an organization assigned  If a user is just a member of a project within the workspace, they'll still have access to the project, but not to the workspace itself (the default for existing workspaces)

schema.description: The standard Ory JSON API error format.

debug.description: Debug contains debug information. This is usually not available and has to be enabled.
debug.example: The database adapter was unable to find the element

error.example: The requested resource could not be found

error_description.description: Description contains further information on the nature of the error.
error_description.example: Object with ID 12345 does not exist

id.description:
ID is a unique error ID.
feature_not_available ErrFeatureNotAvailable
quota_exceeded ErrQuotaExceeded

status_code.description: Code represents the error status code (404, 403, 401, ...).

schema.title: JSON API Error Response
